subcodes.first_line: O Murtaza, how fortunate and blessed was thy destiny that thou wert enabled to serve the friends, and especially His Holiness the Afnán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرتضی چه خوش بخت و فرخنده طالع بودی که بخدمت یاران و خصوصا حضرت افنان موفق
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
